name: cave-exploration
description: 洞穴探险 - Stella发现一个深邃的洞穴系统,深入探索发现bioluminescent晶体、地下水源和神秘的古老痕迹
capabilities: Interactive storytelling with branching narrative paths
Character role-play as astronaut Stella Chen
Multiple exploration routes with unique discoveries
Crisis management scenarios and survival themes
author: ClaudeCode-NPC
securitySummary: Pure text-based interactive fiction skill with no executable code, network calls, or file system access. All 27 static findings are false positives from substring matching errors on narrative text and markdown syntax misinterpretation. The 'beacon' references are emergency safety equipment, not malware C2 infrastructure.
valueStatement: Embark on an interactive sci-fi adventure exploring a mysterious alien cave. Guide astronaut Stella through discoveries of bioluminescent crystals and ancient ruins while making critical choices that shape the story.
limitations: Text output only with no visual elements

useCases.title: Alien exploration story
useCases.description: Experience an immersive sci-fi adventure on an alien planet through interactive text and character dialogue

useCases.title: Writing inspiration
useCases.description: Generate ideas for sci-fi stories, dialogue, and world-building with alien civilizations and environments

useCases.title: English practice
useCases.description: Read and interact with engaging English dialogue in a fun adventure context with character interaction

promptTemplates.title: Begin adventure
promptTemplates.prompt: Help Stella explore the cave system. What should she do first at the cave entrance?

promptTemplates.title: Choose path
promptTemplates.prompt: Stella found three cave paths. Left goes up with wind, middle goes down toward water, right has strange markings. What path should she take?

promptTemplates.title: Crisis response
promptTemplates.prompt: The cave is collapsing! Stella is trapped. What should she do to escape safely?

promptTemplates.title: Deep discovery
promptTemplates.prompt: Stella discovered ancient cave carvings that tell the story of an alien civilization. What questions should she ask about this discovery?

bestPractices: Guide Stella systematically through each story phase for the full experience
Encourage her scientific reasoning and problem-solving approach during exploration
Support her during crisis moments for emotional story development
antiPatterns: Asking for file operations or system commands that this skill cannot perform
Requesting external data or real-time information outside the story
Expecting persistent state or game progress between different conversations

faq.question: Which AI tools support this skill?
faq.answer: Compatible with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code for interactive text generation

faq.question: How long does the adventure take?
faq.answer: Each playthrough takes 30-40 minutes through five story phases with multiple outcomes

faq.question: Can choices change the ending?
faq.answer: Yes, exploration paths and crisis choices lead to different story conclusions

faq.question: Is my data stored?
faq.answer: No data is stored. Each conversation is independent with no persistent state

faq.question: Why is text mixed with Chinese?
faq.answer: Stella is a Chinese astronaut who naturally mixes languages in her dialogue

faq.question: How is this different from games?
faq.answer: Pure interactive fiction focused on dialogue and character-driven storytelling
